articles.original_title: Exclusive: Lakshmi Parvathi Speaks Without Filters
articles.original_content: Lakshmi Parvathi, General Secretary of the YSR Congress Party, shared her views in an exclusive interaction with senior journalist GR Maharshi for Peoples Feedback. The conversation covered a wide range of political developments in Andhra Pradesh and reflected her characteristic style of speaking. During the discussion, she raised concerns about EVMs and expressed suspicions about their functioning. When asked a pointed question on how YSRCP plans to win in 2029 if EVMs are indeed an issue, Lakshmi Parvathi responded that the party would be far more vigilant in the future. She stated that they would work on creating awareness and sensitizing people to ensure better oversight during elections. She also addressed allegations related to women trafficking during YSRCP rule, that were raised by Pawan Kalyan. She also turned the focus toward the current alliance government, alleging that there has been a rise in violence against women. She claimed that hundreds of such incidents have taken place across the state, making it a serious concern. Apart from these topics, she spoke on several other political and social issues, making the conversation engaging throughout. The interview offers insight into her perspective on current affairs and future political strategies. Viewers can watch the full interview here:
